html:
Exclusive to:  

A Snakeskin Hat is a craftable Dress Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is the DLC's version of the Rain Hat. It requires 1 Snakeskin, 1 Straw Hat, and 1 Bone Shard to craft and an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its durability.

When worn during Rain, it protects against Wetness gain by 70%. Additionally, it insulates the player against Lightning strikes and the electric shocks of Jellyfish.

Hamlet

The Snakeskin Hat is also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, it has a very different appearance as Snakeskin is obtained from Vipers. It is especially useful by offering protection against Lightning strikes produced by Thunderbirds.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Snakeskin Hat.

  • Wendy wearing a Snakeskin Hat.

  • Woodie wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wes wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Maxwell wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Webber wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Walani wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Warly wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wilbur wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wilba wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wormwood wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wilba wearing the Hamlet version of the Snakeskin Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing the Hamlet version of the Snakeskin Hat.

“It should repel the rain from my hair.”
–Wilson
“Water just runs right off it.”
–Willow
“Very good.”
–Wolfgang
“A hat of trophies, wrenched from the dead!”
–Wendy
“LEATHERY HEADWEAR”
–WX-78
“Rain repellent headwear!”
–Wickerbottom
“Now would this be a "touque" or a "tuque"?”
–Woodie
“Quite dashing, actually.”
–Maxwell
“Smells not unlike wet snake.”
–Wagstaff
“Shall I wear the serpent?”
–Wigfrid
“Does snakeskin make us look tough?”
–Webber
“Raindrops keep falling on my hat.”
–Walani
“Tres cool.”
–Warly
“On me head? Wear thet?”
–Woodlegs
“HATH A FASHION AND A FUNCTION”
–Wilba
“Snazzy Squirmy head thing”
–Wormwood
“A good hat if you don't like being struck by lightning.”
–Wheeler
A Snakeskin Hat is a craftable Dress Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is the DLC's version of the Rain Hat. It requires 1 Snakeskin, 1 Straw Hat, and 1 Bone Shard to craft and an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype. The Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its durability.
When worn during Rain, it protects against Wetness gain by 70%. Additionally, it insulates the player against Lightning strikes and the electric shocks of Jellyfish.

The Snakeskin Hat is also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, it has a very different appearance as Snakeskin is obtained from Vipers. It is especially useful by offering protection against Lightning strikes produced by Thunderbirds.
